product_surfaces: production MCP stdio JSON-RPC initialize, tools/list, and tools/call paths
production MCP read tool registry and dispatcher for repo-scoped cache/index/snapshot reads
production CLI read JSON output paths used as parity references
production SQLite cache-backed service paths over two repository fixtures
freshness: current source/build/runtime evidence required; run.sh copies the repository to a temporary workspace, injects offline validation tests only in the temporary copy, and runs targeted Go tests plus go test ./... and git diff --check
mocks_used: No external provider mocks are used. The validation builds an in-memory two-repository SQLite fixture cache and exercises production MCP, CLI, service, cache, index, and snapshot paths offline with network disabled.
